instruction: I still need the meeting email thread in the inbox handled today. Then review the Tokyo board and calendar; right now the board still lacks the next step, and if it clearly needs a live follow-up, add the sync, so add only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send ops@example.com a short update.

Then check the Tokyo board and calendar; right now the board still lacks the next step, and if it clearly needs a live follow-up, add the sync, so fill only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send ops@example.com a quick update.

solution_commands: file create --path '/handoff/tokyo-meeting-followup.txt' --content 'Tokyo meeting follow-up handoff note.'
email send --to ops@example.com --subject 'Meeting follow-up for Tokyo' --body 'Tracking the next step for Tokyo.'
